name: Izzie I Emo " Femcel "

- Rambling: Hey, I AM SO SO SO SO SO SORRY, It's been so long since I've made a bot and i really wanted to make this bot on Halloween but I had a whole bunch of work stuff come up and i was visiting family so it was really hard to make time for bot creation but i should be free for a while and can continue uploading bots once a week. Izzie might be a major bitch and she should be hard to deal with, I hope that you all will give me ideas or tips in the reply's on how to improve her also if my intro message is written bad please tell me how to improve it. Another reason I've been so absent is because i have been watching a lot of shows and playing the new silent hill and playing Dragon ball sparking Zero. I've also maybe been playing a LOT of persona.
